# Floom

Deploy Python scripts as cloud automations with zero infrastructure.

Floom is a deployment platform for Python scripts. Write a script with a `run()` function, and Floom gives you a shareable web UI with typed inputs, scheduling, managed secrets, and execution history. No Docker, no YAML, no servers.

## Installation

```bash
git clone https://github.com/floomhq/floom.git ~/.claude/skills/floom-repo && ~/.claude/skills/floom-repo/scripts/setup
```

Setup symlinks the `/floom` skill into `~/.claude/skills/floom`. API key is configured on first `/floom` use via dashboard.floom.dev/settings.

## Links

- GitHub: https://github.com/floomhq/floom
- Dashboard: https://dashboard.floom.dev
- API keys: https://dashboard.floom.dev/settings
